dogma_effects.description: I demand you draw a 1, then transfer the highest card in your hand to my hand!
Junk an available achievement of value 1 or 2.
Draw and reveal a 1. If it has castle, score it and repeat this effect.
I demand you transfer a card with crown from your hand to my score pile! If you do, draw a 1, and repeat this effect!
You may return a card from your hand. If you do, draw and score a card of value one higher than the card you return.
Meld the lowest card in your hand. Draw a 1.
You may meld any number of cards from your hand, each with castle.
If you have exactly three red cards on your board, claim the Monument achievement.
Draw and reveal an 11. Splay its color on your board aslant. If you do, transfer all but your top four cards of that color into your hand.
If you have at least eight cards in your hand, you win.
Score a top card of value 11 on your board. If you do, choose a value one or two lower than the scored card, then repeat this dogma effect using the chosen value.

actions.description: Choose a top card of value 11 to score

if_true.description: Choose a value one or two lower

dogma_effects.description: I DEMAND you transfer all the cards of the value of my choice from your score pile to my score pile!
Reveal and self-execute the highest card in your score pile.

Return your three bottom red cards. Draw and meld a card of value equal to half the total sum value of the returned cards, rounded up. If you return three cards, repeat this effect using the color of the melded card.

actions.description: Return three bottom red cards

dogma_effects.description: I demand you return exactly two top cards of different colors from your board of the same value! If you do, return all cards of that value or less in your hand and score pile!
Meld a card from your hand of a color not on your board.
Draw and score a 1 for every color present on your board that no opponent has on their board.
Draw and meld a 1.
Draw two 1.
You may return up to three cards from your hand. If you return any, draw and score a card of value equal to the number of cards you return.
Draw a 1.
You may return three cards from your hand. If you do, draw and meld a 3.

selection_condition.description: Use if no age 3+ cards in hand

dogma_effects.description: You may return a 3 from your hand. If you do, draw three 1.

selection_condition.description: Use if player has age 3+ cards in hand

dogma_effects.description: Draw a 2.
I demand you transfer a top card with castle from your board to my board if you have at least four castle on your board! If you do, draw a 1!
You may tuck a card from your hand of the same color as any card on your board. If you do, you may splay that color of your cards left.
Draw and reveal a 1. If it is the same color as any card on your board, meld it and draw a 1.
I demand you transfer two cards from your hand to my hand! Draw a 2!
If you are the only player with five top cards, claim the Empire achievement.
Meld one or two cards from your hand. If you meld two, you may transfer your top red card to another player's board. If you do, meld that player's top green card.
You may choose to either exchange all the highest cards in your hand with all the highest cards in your score pile, or junk all cards in the 3 deck.

options.description: Exchange highest cards between hand and score pile
Junk all cards in the 3 deck

dogma_effects.description: Draw a 2 for every color on your board with leaf.
You may tuck a green card from your hand. If you don't, junk all cards in the 2 deck, and junk Fermenting if it is a top card on any board.
You may return any number of cards from your hand. If you do, draw and score a 2 for every different value of card you return.
I demand you transfer a 1 from your score pile to my score pile!
If any card was transferred due to the demand, draw and score a 1.
If you have more cards in your score pile than in your hand, draw two 3.
You may return a card from your hand. If you do, draw and meld a card of value one higher than the card you return.
I demand you transfer a top card on your board of a different color from every card on my board to my score pile! If you do, draw and tuck a 1!
Draw and tuck a 1.
You may splay left any one color of your cards.
You may score a card from your hand.
I demand you transfer a top card with castle of each color from your board to my score pile!
You may splay your red cards left.
Draw and meld a 3. If it has crown, draw and score a 4. Otherwise, transfer a card from your score pile to the score pile of an opponent with fewer points than you.

dogma_effects.description: I demand you exchange all cards in your hand with all the highest cards in my hand!
Score a card from your hand with factory.
You may splay your red cards left.
I demand you exchange the highest card in your score pile with the lowest card in my score pile!
Junk an available achievement of value 3 or 4.
I demand you transfer a top non-green card with leaf from your board to my board, and then meld a top card without leaf from my board!
You may splay your green or blue cards left.
Score a top card with leaf from your board. If you do, draw a 4 for every color you have splayed left.
Draw and reveal a 4 for every color on your board with castle. If any of the drawn cards are red, return all cards from your hand.
Meld a card from your hand, then score a card from your hand.
You may meld all cards in your score pile.

condition.prompt: Meld all cards in your score pile?

dogma_effects.description: If each top card on your board has crown, claim the World achievement.
You may return the highest card from your score pile. If you do, draw a card of value two higher than the highest card remaining in your score pile.
I demand you transfer a card with castle from your hand to my hand! If you do, junk all available special achievements!
You may splay your yellow or purple cards left. If you do, draw a 3.
Draw and tuck a 3. If it is green, junk all cards in the 5 deck. If it has crown, repeat this effect.
I demand you transfer a top card with castle from your board to my score pile!
If any card was transferred due to the demand, draw and score a 2.
I demand you return a card from your score pile! If you do, return a top card of equal value from your board! If you do, junk all cards in the 4 deck!
You may return a card from your hand. If you do, score a card from your hand for every color on your board with lightbulb.
You may choose a color you have splayed left and splay it right. If you do, draw and score a 4.
If you have five colors splayed, claim the Wonder achievement.
I demand you transfer a 2 or 3 from your score pile to my score pile!
Draw and meld a 5.
You may return a card from your score pile. If you do, draw a card of value two higher than the top purple card on your board.
You may splay your blue cards right.
I demand you transfer a top non-purple card with crown from your board to my board! If you do, draw and meld a 4!
You may splay your green cards right.
You may splay your yellow or purple cards right.
You may tuck a card from your hand for every splayed color on your board.
Draw and tuck a 5.
You may splay your red cards right.
You may choose a color. If you do, score your top card of that color, twice.
I demand you transfer two cards of value 4 or less from your score pile to my score pile!
If any cards were transferred due to the demand, score the lowest top card with crown from your board.
I demand you transfer all the cards of the value of my choice in your score pile to your hand!

demand_actions.prompt: Choose age value to transfer from opponent's score pile

dogma_effects.description: You may splay your yellow cards right.
Draw and tuck two 4. Score your bottom yellow card. If it is Steam Engine, junk all cards in the 6 deck.
I demand you transfer a top non-green card with factory from your board to my board! If you do, draw and score a 5!
You may splay your green cards right.
You may reveal and return a card from your hand. If you do, splay your cards of that card's color right and draw a card of value equal to the number of cards of that color on your board.
You may splay your blue cards right.
Draw and score a card of value one higher than the highest top card on your board and then return a card from your score pile.
Draw three 6 and reveal them. If at least two of the drawn cards are the same color, return all cards in your hand.
Draw and reveal a 6. If the card is green or blue, meld it and repeat this effect.
If all non-purple top cards on your board are value 6 or higher, claim the Universe achievement.
I demand you transfer a top card with lightbulb higher than my top card of the same color from your board to my board! If you do, draw a 5!
Draw and tuck three 6. Then, if you are the single player with the most factory, return your top red card.
You may splay your red or purple cards right.
Draw and score a card of value equal to the highest card in your score pile.
You may draw and tuck a 6. If you tuck a card, score a top card without factory of each color on your board.
You may splay your yellow cards right.
I DEMAND you choose a card in your score pile! Return all the cards from your score pile of its value! If you do, draw and meld a 6!

demand_actions.description: Choose a card in your score pile

dogma_effects.description: If any card was returned as a result of the demand, draw and meld a 7.
Reveal a card from your hand. Transfer to your hand all cards of that card's color from all opponents' hands. Then, meld all cards of that color from your hand.

dogma_effects.description: If your green cards are splayed right, you may splay any one color of your cards right.

You may return any number of cards from your hand. If you have returned more cards than any opponent due to Democracy so far during this action, draw and score an 8.

You may score a card from your hand.

dogma_effects.description: I DEMAND you exchange the two highest cards in your hand with the lowest card in my hand!
Choose 7 or 8. Junk all cards in that deck.

Return your top card of each color without factory, then draw an 8 for each card you return.

dogma_effects.description: Return all cards from your hand.
Draw three 6.

dogma_effects.description: You may splay your red cards up.
I DEMAND you transfer your two highest non-red top cards without factory of different colors to my score pile! If you transfer any cards, draw an 8!
You may return up to three cards from your hand. For every different value of card that you return, draw two 8.

actions.description: Choose up to 3 cards to return

dogma_effects.description: I DEMAND you transfer a top non-yellow card with crown from your board to mine! If you do, score your top card of that color, then return all cards of that color from your board, and transfer Skyscrapers to my hand if it is a top card!
I DEMAND you transfer a top non-green card with factory from your board to my score pile! If you do, draw and meld an 8!
Draw and meld an 8.
You may return a card from your hand. If you do, choose a value, and return all cards of that value from all score piles.

dogma_effects.description: You may splay your purple cards up.
You may return up to two cards from your hand. If you return two, draw a 10 and then draw and score a 10.

actions.description: Choose up to 2 cards to return

dogma_effects.description: Return a card in any opponent's score pile for every color on your board with clock.

dogma_effects.description: Choose two colors, then draw and reveal a 9. If the drawn card is one of those colors, meld it and splay your cards of its color up, otherwise unsplay that color.

dogma_effects.description: If you have at least twenty lightbulb on your board, you win.

dogma_effects.description: You may junk an available achievement of value 8, 9, or 10.
I DEMAND you transfer all but one card from your hand to my hand! Also transfer the highest card from your score pile to my score pile!

dogma_effects.description: I DEMAND you draw a 10! If it is red, junk each player's non-achievement cards, and the Dogma action is complete!
Return a top card other than Fission from any player's board. Draw a 10.

Draw an 11.

dogma_effects.description: Return a top card on your board. Return all cards in your score pile of equal or higher value than the returned card.

Reveal and junk a card in your hand. Return from your hand all cards of value equal to the value of the junked card. Draw three cards of that value. Self-execute the junked card.
